description: Patch definitions for Claude Code binary reverse patching

patches.name: compact-prompt-trim-examples-and-inject-memory
patches.description: Replace the verbose example block at the end of compact prompt with memory archiving instructions. Net size change should be negative or zero.
patches.anchor:
There may be additional summarization instructions provided in the included context. If so, remember to follow these instructions when creating the above summary. Examples of instructions include:
<example>
## Compact Instructions
When summarizing the conversation focus on typescript code changes and also remember the mistakes you made and how you fixed them.
</example>

<example>
# Summary instructions
When you are using compact - please focus on test output and code changes. Include file reads verbatim.
</example>
patches.replacement:
If additional summarization instructions are provided, follow them.

IMPORTANT Memory Archiving: Also extract persistent facts from this conversation (user preferences, decisions, life events) into a <memory_archive> block after </summary>. Format: category.key: value (categories: core, active, archive).
